# Soft15 Async4 Hard50 Contract

## Soft 15
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.15 with quality bias floor 0.13 so reclaim can tighten after emergency backstops

## Async 4
async pre-rot and swarm micro pressure default to 0.04 so reclaim starts earlier

## Hard 50
hard block defaults to 0.50 with absolute trigger 34k for denser long-horizon reclaim

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/status/usage vitest
